soc_readiness_note: Score based on static analysis. Run GET /api/security/soc for live score.

owasp_simulations.evidence: Supabase SDK uses parameterized queries. No raw SQL string interpolation. Input validation via Zod.
RLS enforced on all 32+ tables. RBAC 7 roles. requiresRole() on all sensitive API routes.
All external HTTP calls use allowlisted domains. Provider adapters use hardcoded base URLs.
paymentIdempotencyGuard.checkIdempotency() blocks duplicate payments. SHA-256 date-scoped keys prevent replay.
Bearer tokens validated with timingSafeEqual. NEXTAUTH_SECRET enforced on all auth endpoints.

intrusion_detection_vectors: Privilege Escalation — role mismatch + admin endpoint access + multiple role changes
Tenant Leakage — cross-tenant resource access (RLS bypass detection)
Replay Attack — timestamp drift ±5min window + idempotency key replay check
Data Exfiltration — bulk response >10K records, after-hours bulk export
Anomalous Capital Flow — 3× historical average or first transaction >€500K
escalation_note: Set PAGERDUTY_INTEGRATION_KEY or SLACK_SECURITY_WEBHOOK for SEV1/SEV2 human escalation
activation_checklist: Set DD_API_KEY (Datadog EU — GDPR compliant for EU operations)
Set PAGERDUTY_INTEGRATION_KEY or SLACK_SECURITY_WEBHOOK for human escalation
Run POST /api/security/soc to generate live SOC report with OWASP simulations
